description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 2 hrs 53 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 57 mins. His most-used languages were Java, Bash, and Markdown. The activity data shows work across 4 projects, but no public repository names, commits, pull requests, or new repositories were recorded.
